entity.maine_business_purpose.label: THIRD: The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is ___ (If no change, so indicate.)

entity.principal_office.physical_address.label: FOURTH: The new address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (If no change, so indicate.) (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)

contact_partner.name.label: FIFTH: The name and or the business, residence or mailing address of the contact partner has been changed to: (If no change, so indicate.) — Name

filing.other_amendments_exhibit_letter.label: SIXTH: Other amendments to the application, if any, are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
